request.garment: oversized black washed denim jacket with button front, point collar, chest pockets, panel seams, frayed cuff detail, and boxy silhouette

pose.name: Natural Walk Forward
pose.direction: Walk toward camera with a relaxed stride and arms moving naturally.

recommendations.lighting: Natural daylight or soft overcast light, balanced skin tones, no harsh distractions.
recommendations.reason: Ranked for lookbook as a walking shot because Street Style Motion supports this goal: make the outfit feel wearable, current, and active in a real-world setting. Natural Walk Forward matches the shot type, 35mm Environmental Fashion fits the framing, and Rooftop Daylight supports the campaign mood for oversized black washed denim jacket with button front, point collar, chest pockets, panel seams, frayed cuff detail, and boxy silhouette.

pose.name: Confident Pocket Hand

recommendations.lighting: Large soft key light from the front-left, gentle fill, controlled shadow under the feet.
recommendations.reason: Ranked for lookbook as a front shot because Commercial Hero Front View supports this goal: show the full outfit clearly while creating a confident brand-first image.
